description: Manage Okta directory users, groups, memberships, and user lifecycle operations.

fields.label: Org URL
fields.description: The HTTPS base URL for your Okta organization, such as https://example.okta.com or your configured Okta custom domain.

fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Okta API token sent with the Authorization: SSWS header. Create it in the Admin Console under Security > API > Tokens: https://developer.okta.com/docs/guides/create-an-api-token/main/.

actions.name: add_user_to_group
actions.description: Assign an Okta user to an Okta-managed group.

userId.description: The Okta user ID, login, or login shortname accepted by the Users API.

inputSchema.description: The Okta group membership to create.

added.description: Whether Okta accepted the membership assignment.

outputSchema.description: The Okta group membership assignment result.

anyOf.description: The Okta group type, such as OKTA_GROUP.
When Okta created the group.
When the group was last updated.
When the group membership last changed.

actions.name: create_user
actions.description: Create an Okta user with profile, credentials, group assignments, and activation options.

profile.description: Okta user profile fields, including required attributes and custom profile properties.

credentials.description: Okta user credentials, such as password, recovery question, or authentication provider fields.

groupIds.description: Okta group IDs assigned during creation.

activate.description: Whether Okta should activate the user after creation.

provider.description: Whether the credentials specify an authentication provider for the user.

nextLogin.description: The password behavior for the user's next login.

anyOf.description: The Okta user status, such as ACTIVE or SUSPENDED.
When Okta created the user.
When Okta activated the user.
When the user status last changed.
When the user last signed in.
When the user was last updated.
When the user password last changed.

profile.description: The Okta user profile, including custom attributes.

actions.name: delete_group
actions.description: Delete an Okta-managed group by ID.

deleted.description: Whether Okta accepted the group deletion.

actions.name: delete_user
actions.description: Deactivate an active Okta user, or permanently delete a user that is already deactivated.

userId.description: The Okta user ID, login, or login shortname accepted by the Users API.

sendEmail.description: Whether Okta should send a deactivation email to the admin.

userId.description: The requested Okta user ID or login.

result.description: Whether the request deactivated or permanently deleted the user.

deleted.description: Whether the user was permanently deleted.

outputSchema.description: The result of the Okta user deletion request.

actions.name: get_group
actions.description: Get one Okta group by ID.

anyOf.description: The Okta group type, such as OKTA_GROUP.
When Okta created the group.
When the group was last updated.
When the group membership last changed.

actions.name: get_user
actions.description: Get one Okta user by ID, login, or login shortname.

userId.description: The Okta user ID, login, or login shortname accepted by the Users API.

anyOf.description: The Okta user status, such as ACTIVE or SUSPENDED.
When Okta created the user.
When Okta activated the user.
When the user status last changed.
When the user last signed in.
When the user was last updated.
When the user password last changed.

profile.description: The Okta user profile, including custom attributes.

actions.name: lifecycle_user
actions.description: Activate, reactivate, deactivate, suspend, unsuspend, unlock, or expire an Okta user's password.

userId.description: The Okta user ID, login, or login shortname accepted by the Users API.

sendEmail.description: Whether supported activation or deactivation operations should send email.

tempPassword.description: For expire_password, whether Okta should expire the password and return a temporary password.

revokeSessions.description: When returning a temporary password, whether Okta should revoke the user's existing sessions.

userId.description: The requested Okta user ID or login.

anyOf.description: The Okta lifecycle response body, or null for an empty response.
The raw Okta lifecycle response body, or null for an empty response.

actions.name: list_group_users
actions.description: List the users that are members of an Okta group.

limit.description: The maximum number of group members to return.

after.description: The opaque Okta pagination cursor from a previous response.

inputSchema.description: Options for listing Okta group members.

anyOf.description: The Okta user status, such as ACTIVE or SUSPENDED.
When Okta created the user.
When Okta activated the user.
When the user status last changed.
When the user last signed in.
When the user was last updated.
When the user password last changed.

profile.description: The Okta user profile, including custom attributes.

anyOf.description: The next Okta after cursor, or null for the final page.

actions.name: list_groups
actions.description: List Okta groups with search, filtering, sorting, expansion, and cursor pagination.

limit.description: The maximum number of groups to return.

after.description: The opaque Okta pagination cursor from a previous response.

search.description: An Okta Groups API search expression.

filter.description: An Okta Groups API filter expression.

q.description: A simple query that matches the Okta group name.

sortBy.description: The group property used to sort search results.

sortOrder.description: The sort direction for an Okta search query.

anyOf.description: The Okta group type, such as OKTA_GROUP.
When Okta created the group.
When the group was last updated.
When the group membership last changed.
The next Okta after cursor, or null for the final page.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List Okta users with search, filtering, sorting, field projection, and cursor pagination.

limit.description: The maximum number of users to return.

after.description: The opaque Okta pagination cursor from a previous response.

search.description: An Okta Users API search expression.

filter.description: An Okta Users API filter expression.

q.description: A simple prefix query for user first name, last name, or email.

sortBy.description: The user property used to sort search results.

sortOrder.description: The sort direction for an Okta search query.

fields.description: A comma-separated projection of user properties to return.

anyOf.description: The Okta user status, such as ACTIVE or SUSPENDED.
When Okta created the user.
When Okta activated the user.
When the user status last changed.
When the user last signed in.
When the user was last updated.
When the user password last changed.

profile.description: The Okta user profile, including custom attributes.

anyOf.description: The next Okta after cursor, or null for the final page.

actions.name: remove_user_from_group
actions.description: Unassign an Okta user from an Okta-managed group.

userId.description: The Okta user ID, login, or login shortname accepted by the Users API.

inputSchema.description: The Okta group membership to remove.

removed.description: Whether Okta accepted the membership removal.

outputSchema.description: The Okta group membership removal result.

anyOf.description: The Okta group type, such as OKTA_GROUP.
When Okta created the group.
When the group was last updated.
When the group membership last changed.

actions.name: update_user
actions.description: Partially update an Okta user's profile or credentials.

userId.description: The Okta user ID, login, or login shortname accepted by the Users API.

profile.description: Okta user profile fields, including required attributes and custom profile properties.

credentials.description: Okta user credentials, such as password, recovery question, or authentication provider fields.

strict.description: Whether Okta should enforce password age and history policies.

inputSchema.description: The Okta user partial update request.

anyOf.description: The Okta user status, such as ACTIVE or SUSPENDED.
When Okta created the user.
When Okta activated the user.
When the user status last changed.
When the user last signed in.
When the user was last updated.
When the user password last changed.
